name: HAIROTICMEN Focus Final Check
objective: Launch and grow HAIROTICMEN in the German market through a professional ecommerce, content, partner, and multi-channel marketing system.
audience: Style-conscious German men aged 20–45, including beard enthusiasts, daily groomers, hair styling users, shaving-care buyers, and premium grooming customers.
offer: Premium men’s grooming for confident, well-styled men — professional beard, hair, shaving, skin-care, and grooming products designed for everyday performance and barbershop-level results.

form_values.campaignGoal: Launch and grow HAIROTICMEN in the German market through a professional ecommerce, content, partner, and multi-channel marketing system.
form_values.productAngle: HAIROTICMEN is positioned as a premium German-market men’s grooming brand distributed by MH Trading UG, combining professional product quality, ecommerce convenience, and a scalable partner ecosystem for consumers, barbershops, salons, dealers, affiliates, and sales representatives.
form_values.audiencePrimary: Style-conscious German men aged 20–45, including beard enthusiasts, daily groomers, hair styling users, shaving-care buyers, and premium grooming customers.
form_values.audienceNeed: Men want reliable, stylish, premium grooming products that help them look confident and well-groomed without generic low-quality alternatives, unclear routines, or inconsistent results.
form_values.offerHeadline: Premium men’s grooming for confident, well-styled men — professional beard, hair, shaving, skin-care, and grooming products designed for everyday performance and barbershop-level results.
form_values.offerDetail: HAIROTICMEN is positioned as a premium German-market men’s grooming brand distributed by MH Trading UG, combining professional product quality, ecommerce convenience, and a scalable partner ecosystem for consumers, barbershops, salons, dealers, affiliates, and sales representatives.
form_values.assetChecklist: Logo / Logo, Brand Guideline / Markenrichtlinie, Product Data / Produktdaten, Pricing & Offers / Preise & Angebote, Legal Documents / Rechtliche Dokumente, Product Photos / Produktfotos, Product Videos / Produktvideos, Social Assets / Social-Media-Assets, Campaign Assets / Kampagnenmaterial, Packaging Images / Verpackungsbilder, Testimonials & Reviews / Kundenstimmen & Bewertungen, Certificates / Zertifikate, Partner Documents / Partnerdokumente
